title: Lufia: The Legend Returns
facts: Lufia: The Legend Returns landed on Game Boy Color in 2001 and somehow squeezed an ambitious RPG into a very pocket-sized cartridge. Its ancient cave dungeon shifts and sprawls, giving treasure hunters plenty of reasons to mutter ‘just one more floor’ before losing an entire afternoon. The capsule monster system adds a quirky collectible twist, because apparently your party wasn’t already busy enough. It’s a handheld adventure that punches above its weight like a knight wearing a backpack full of secrets.
